question: Which program received the most applications?
query: SELECT p.program_name, COUNT(a.application_id) AS application_count FROM application a JOIN program p ON p.program_id = a.program_id GROUP BY a.program_id ORDER BY application_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: What is the average test score per test type?
query: SELECT et.test_type, AVG(ta.score) AS avg_score FROM test_attempt ta JOIN entry_test et ON et.test_id = ta.test_id GROUP BY et.test_type ORDER BY avg_score DESC;

question: List all applicants who were selected or enrolled in BS Computer Science.
query: SELECT ap.full_name FROM applicant ap JOIN application a ON a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id WHERE a.program_id = 'BSCS' AND a.status IN ('Selected', 'Enrolled');

question: How many students are enrolled in each program?
query: SELECT p.program_name, COUNT(s.student_id) AS student_count FROM student s JOIN program p ON p.program_id = s.program_id GROUP BY s.program_id ORDER BY student_count DESC;

question: What are the top 5 highest test scores of all time?
query: SELECT ap.full_name, et.test_type, ta.score FROM test_attempt ta JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = ta.applicant_id JOIN entry_test et ON et.test_id = ta.test_id ORDER BY ta.score DESC LIMIT 5;

question: How many rejected applicants had a best test score above 140?
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ap.applicant_id) AS rejected_high_scorers FROM applicant ap JOIN application a ON a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id WHERE a.status = 'Rejected' AND ap.best_test_score > 140;

question: Which school owns the most courses?
query: SELECT sc.school_name, COUNT(c.course_code) AS course_count FROM course c JOIN school sc ON sc.school_id = c.school_id GROUP BY c.school_id ORDER BY course_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: List all courses offered by SEECS.
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, c.credit_hours FROM course c WHERE c.school_id = 'SEECS';

question: Which courses are shared across multiple programs?
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, COUNT(pc.program_id) AS num_programs FROM course c JOIN program_course pc ON pc.course_code = c.course_code GROUP BY c.course_code HAVING num_programs > 1 ORDER BY num_programs DESC;

question: Which faculty member is teaching the most sections in Fall 2025?
query: SELECT f.full_name, COUNT(s.section_id) AS section_count FROM section s JOIN faculty f ON f.faculty_id = s.faculty_id JOIN term t ON t.term_id = s.term_id WHERE t.term_name = 'Fall' AND t.academic_year = 2025 GROUP BY s.faculty_id ORDER BY section_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Show the full transcript for student S001.
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, t.term_name, t.academic_year, e.grade FROM enrollment e JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = e.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_code = sec.course_code JOIN term t ON t.term_id = sec.term_id WHERE e.student_id = 'S001' ORDER BY t.start_date;

question: How many students are currently in progress in Database Systems?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS enrollment_count FROM enrollment e JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = e.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_code = sec.course_code WHERE c.course_title = 'Database Systems' AND e.grade IS NULL;

question: Which applicants scored above the average score for the test they took?
query: SELECT ap.full_name, et.test_type, ta.score FROM test_attempt ta JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = ta.applicant_id JOIN entry_test et ON et.test_id = ta.test_id WHERE ta.score > (SELECT AVG(ta2.score) FROM test_attempt ta2 WHERE ta2.test_id = ta.test_id);

question: What is the conversion rate from applications to students for each school?
query: SELECT sc.school_name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.application_id) AS total_applications, COUNT(DISTINCT st.student_id) AS converted_students FROM school sc JOIN program p ON p.school_id = sc.school_id LEFT JOIN application a ON a.program_id = p.program_id LEFT JOIN student st ON st.program_id = p.program_id GROUP BY sc.school_id;

question: Which classrooms are hosting more than 2 sections?
query: SELECT cl.building, cl.room_number, COUNT(s.section_id) AS sections_hosted FROM classroom cl LEFT JOIN section s ON s.classroom_id = cl.classroom_id GROUP BY cl.classroom_id HAVING sections_hosted > 2 ORDER BY sections_hosted DESC;

question: Which courses have no sections offered in Fall 2025?
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title FROM course c LEFT JOIN section s ON s.course_code = c.course_code AND s.term_id = (SELECT t.term_id FROM term t WHERE t.term_name = 'Fall' AND t.academic_year = 2025) WHERE s.section_id IS NULL;

question: Which core courses does the BS Computer Science program require in its first two semesters?
query: SELECT c.course_code, c.course_title, pc.recommended_semester FROM program_course pc JOIN course c ON c.course_code = pc.course_code WHERE pc.program_id = 'BSCS' AND pc.is_core = TRUE AND pc.recommended_semester <= 2 ORDER BY pc.recommended_semester;

question: Rank all applicants for BSCS by their best test score.
query: SELECT ap.applicant_id, ap.full_name, ap.best_test_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ap.best_test_score DESC) AS merit_rank FROM applicant ap JOIN application a ON a.applicant_id = ap.applicant_id WHERE a.program_id = 'BSCS';

question: Which students have a failing grade (F) in any course?
query: SELECT s.full_name, c.course_code, c.course_title, e.grade FROM enrollment e JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN section sec ON sec.section_id = e.section_id JOIN course c ON c.course_code = sec.course_code WHERE e.grade = 'F' LIMIT 5;

question: Show all applications and their statuses for applicant Ali Hassan.
query: SELECT a.application_id, p.program_name, a.status, a.submission_date FROM application a JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = a.applicant_id JOIN program p ON p.program_id = a.program_id WHERE ap.full_name = 'Ali Hassan';

question: List all offers that are still awaiting acceptance.
query: SELECT o.offer_id, ap.full_name, p.program_name, o.issue_date, o.expiry_date, o.status FROM offer o JOIN application a ON a.application_id = o.application_id JOIN applicant ap ON ap.applicant_id = a.applicant_id JOIN program p ON p.program_id = a.program_id WHERE o.status = 'Issued' LIMIT 5;

question: What are the prerequisites for each course in the BSCS curriculum?
query: SELECT c1.course_code AS course, c1.course_title, c2.course_code AS prereq_course, c2.course_title AS prereq_title FROM prerequisite pr JOIN course c1 ON c1.course_code = pr.course_code JOIN course c2 ON c2.course_code = pr.prereq_course_code WHERE pr.course_code IN (SELECT pc.course_code FROM program_course pc WHERE pc.program_id = 'BSCS') LIMIT 5;
